class Account extends AccountBase with AccountMixin<Account> {

  static const PREFIX = 'account';

  ];

 static const COL_BALANCE = 'account_balance';
 static const COL_CURRENCY_CODE = 'account_currency_code';
 static const COL_DATA = 'account_data';
 static const COL_CREATED_AT = 'account_created_at';
 static const COL_UPDATED_AT = 'account_updated_at';
 static const COL_VALID = 'account_valid';


  Account([Map<String, dynamic> initialData = const {}])
      : super(
      initialData: initialData,
      name: ENTITY_NAME,
      prefix: PREFIX,
      columns: COLUMNS);

  @override
  Account get self {
    return this;
  }

  @override
  String singlePKValue() {
    return '$id';
  }


  @override
  List<String> identifierColumns() {
    return [

    ];
  }

  @override
  Account fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) {
    return Account(json);
  }

  String|null get id { return doGet(COL_ID, String|null); }
  set id(String|num|null nVal) { doSet(COL_ID, nVal, String|null); }

  Account setID(String|num|null nVal) { id = nVal; return this; }

  set client_id(String|num nVal) { doSet(COL_CLIENT_ID, nVal, String); }

  set label(String nVal) { doSet(COL_LABEL, nVal, String); }
  String getLabel() { return label; }
  Account setLabel(String nVal) { label = nVal; return this; }

  String get balance { return doGet(COL_BALANCE, String); }
  set balance(String|num|num nVal) { doSet(COL_BALANCE, nVal, String); }
  String getBalance() { return balance; }
  Account setBalance(String|num|num nVal) { balance = nVal; return this; }

  String get currency_code { return doGet(COL_CURRENCY_CODE, String); }
  set currency_code(String nVal) { doSet(COL_CURRENCY_CODE, nVal, String); }
  String getCurrencyCode() { return currency_code; }
  Account setCurrencyCode(String nVal) { currency_code = nVal; return this; }

  Map get data { return doGet(COL_DATA, Map); }
  set data(Map|List nVal) { doSet(COL_DATA, nVal, Map); }
  Map getData() { return data; }
  Account setData(Map|List nVal) { data = nVal; return this; }

  set created_at(String|num nVal) { doSet(COL_CREATED_AT, nVal, String); }

  set updated_at(String|num nVal) { doSet(COL_UPDATED_AT, nVal, String); }

  bool getValid() { return valid; }
